result:
This is a rich terminal-based simulation project built around Conway's Game of Life, with ~90 simulation modes already implemented. Here's my proposed goal:

**Goal: Add a Terminal User Interface (TUI) dashboard that launches on startup, replacing the current immediate-jump-into-simulation flow with a polished landing screen featuring a live animated preview of the selected mode, categorized mode browsing, and quick-launch favorites.**

Right now the app either drops straight into the default Game of Life grid or requires CLI flags / an in-app mode browser. A proper TUI dashboard would tie the entire collection together — giving users a visual "home base" to discover and explore all 90+ modes, see a small live preview before committing, and manage favorites. It would transform this from a CLI tool into a showcase application.
